title: 2026 03 31 HackerNews
content: GitHub Copilot has inserted hidden ads into over 1.5 million pull‑request descriptions, prompting developer backlash and a Microsoft apology. ChatGPT’s Cloudflare‑based turnstile blocks typing until extensive fingerprinting and anti‑automation checks finish, worsening UX. Second‑hand Linux machines can be converted into routers with hostapd, dnsmasq, and nftables. AI platforms are tightening control, while regulatory bans—e.g., Philly courts outlawing smart glasses—raise privacy concerns. Meanwhile, Neovim 0.12.0 releases bring new features and fixes across major OSes.

normalizedTitle: 2026 03 31 hackernews

title: 伊朗重申未与美方直接对话，特朗普被曝希望4月6日前达成协议，双方各说各话在博弈什么？为什么是4月6日？
content: 当地时间30日，伊朗外交部发言人巴加埃表示，伊朗迄今未与美国进行任何直接谈判，伊朗方面通过部分中间方收到有关美国表达谈判意愿的信息。外界提及的所谓美方停火“15点计划”，其要求“过分且不合理”。巴加埃表示，与美方不断改变立场、发表相互矛盾言论不同，伊朗方面始终立场明确。 同一天，白宫新闻秘书莱维特在发布会上称，伊朗在非公开会谈中已同意美方提出的部分要点，并称特朗普希望在4月6日前达成协议。莱维特强调，美伊间的对话仍在持续进行，且进展顺利。 特朗普30日称，若与伊朗达不成协议，将“彻底摧毁”该国所有发电厂、油井及哈尔克岛。对此…

title: 全客舱惊声尖叫！巴西一空客A330起飞后发动机爆炸，机上共286人，原计划飞往美国，视频画面公布 | 原文
content: A Delta Air Lines Airbus A330 departed São Paulo’s Guarulhos Airport on March 29. Within about nine minutes, the left engine exploded. The crew returned and performed an emergency landing, safely bringing the 286‑person flight to the ground. No injuries were reported. Fragments fell onto the airport grass, causing a small fire that was extinguished by firefighters. The flight was canceled, passengers were rehoused in São Paulo hotels, and the incident is under investigation.

content: Tesla’s share price has dropped almost 20% in six months, falling over 10% in the last month, signalling a loss of investor confidence in its Robotaxi program. Investors view the decade‑long schedule delay and halted progress as a major credibility hit, undermining the company’s previously high valuation and trust.

title: 一款纯个人开发、“不好意思收费”的武侠TRPG，在Steam上收获了99%好评 | 原文
content: A single‑person developed Chinese wuxia TRPG called “捕刀” (translated “Capture the Knife”) is available for free on Steam. Players assume the role of detective Fu Dongliu, making choices that unveil the truth behind various江湖 rumors. Though only five chapters are released and each takes a few hours, the game has earned a 99% approval rating. The developer, Lu Yu, can be reached via her personal website.

title: Dan Koe：如果你有很多兴趣，别再浪费接下来的 2–3 年 | 原文
content: Dan Koe cautions against spreading oneself thin across many interests. He argues that being told to focus on one thing can induce self-doubt, yet the real barrier often isn’t having many passions but lack of sustained effort and follow‑through. Koe stresses that real progress depends on depth rather than breadth, and that hesitancy and worry arise when people switch projects too quickly. He urges readers to commit more fully to a chosen path for lasting success.
eventKey: dan-koe-如果你有很多兴趣-别再浪费接下来的-2–3
normalizedTitle: dan koe 如果你有很多兴趣 别再浪费接下来的 2–3 年 原文

title: 全行业都狂卷 Harness，Anthropic 还在加码，Codex 负责人却说它正在退场 | 原文
content: The article reports on discussions at OpenAI about the Codex project’s challenges and the emerging uses of its Coding Agent. It outlines the agent as comprising a user interface, a language model (such as OpenAI’s GPT‑5.1 series or third‑party models), and a Harness component that connects the two. The piece notes that while the industry is racing to build Hunts, Anthropic is increasing its efforts, and the Codex lead has indicated the project is winding down.

title: 腾讯宣布企业微信正式开源 CLI AI 可调用日程、文档等 7 大能力
content: Tencent has released an open‑source CLI tool for its Enterprise WeChat platform. The CLI, available on GitHub, exposes seven core capabilities—such as messaging, address book, documents, and smart spreadsheets—for use by mainstream AI agents. Aimed mainly at small companies (10 or fewer users), it enables developers to quickly build AI applications. Integration involves three steps: configure the bot in the Enterprise WeChat backend, install the CLI and skill package, and call the provided skills to access the features.

title: 市场监管总局：推动研究制定《禁止网络不正当竞争条例》
content: The State Administration of Market Regulation announced steps to improve the regulatory framework for anti‑unfair competition. It aims to develop a transparent and predictable legal system, align it with advanced international trade standards, and empower institutional openness. The agency will study the creation of a “Regulation to Prevent Unfair Competition in the Internet,” amend related rules, and prepare industry reports on market pricing and competitive practices, building a multi‑tiered policy toolkit.

title: 阿里千问上线全模态大模型 Qwen3.5-Omni
content: Alibaba has released Qwen3.5‑Omni, a multimodal large model available in Plus, Flash, and Light sizes. It supports a 256k-token context window, over ten hours of audio input, and more than 400 seconds of 720 P video at 1 FPS. The model offers speech recognition in 113 languages and dialects and speech synthesis in 36. It can be accessed via Offline and Realtime APIs.

title: FirstFT：能源冲击下，亚洲各国竭力捍卫本国货币
content: Asian nations are fighting to shield their currencies after an energy shock triggered volatility in the global market. Rising global energy prices pressured local currencies, prompting central banks and governments to intervene and defend national currencies against sharp depreciation. These coordinated efforts aim to stabilize exchange rates and mitigate the impact of heightened energy costs on domestic economies.

title: 苹果 AI 国行正式上线
content: On March 31, 2024 Apple launched its China‑specific AI feature for iPhones. Devices meeting the upgrade criteria will see “Apple Smart & Siri” replace the original Siri option in Settings. After activation, holding the power button triggers a marquee‑style animation instead of the usual Siri animation. The feature reportedly uses Baidu's Wenxin Yiyan model and Google’s image processing engine, while still offering a ChatGPT login interface. An upgrade requires a Mainland China iPhone, iOS 26.4, and a China‑region Apple ID.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 极客公园

title: 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文被中国学者指控学术不端
content: Google researchers claim their TurboQuant algorithm greatly reduces AI model memory usage, but a postdoc from ETH Zurich accuses the paper of academic misconduct, citing omitted similarities to the RaBitQ method and uncorrected issues. Despite repeated outreach, Google has not fully revised the paper and still plans to present it at ICLR 2026. The accuser is preparing a technical report to pursue further academic scrutiny.

content: Google Antigravity grants all users free Pro-level access to AI models, providing 50,000 prompt credits per month. title: GitHub for Beginners: Getting started with GitHub security
content: The article explains how to use GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS) for public repositories, covering secret scanning, Dependabot, code scanning, and Copilot Autofix. It guides enabling these tools via repository settings and navigating the Security tab to view alerts. Secret scanning warns of exposed keys, Dependabot auto‑creates PRs to update vulnerable dependencies, and CodeQL identifies code issues with data flow insights. Developers can review suggested fixes, use Copilot Autofix to create patches, and merge PRs after review. Public repos have free access to these tools for secure development.
eventKey: github-beginners-getting-started-github-security

title: Marc Andreessen on Evaluating Founders and AI's Consumer Surplus
content: Marc Andreessen argues that investors should focus on a founder’s IQ, courage, and drive rather than past mistakes or just the business plan. He believes venture capital should back people, not concepts, and explains how AI is increasingly centering the tech industry in Silicon Valley. Andreessen discusses consumer surplus, noting most AI value will capture 99% for a few entities, and challenges the narrative that AI will displace labor.

title: 微软确认正在大幅改进 Windows 11 搜索功能
content: 微软 Windows 团队证实，针对 Windows 搜索功能的一系列重大改进正在开发当中，目标是解决长期以来搜索结果缓慢、本地文件难以命中、网络推荐过多等问题，让搜索体验变得更简单、更少干扰。这一轮调整由负责 Windows Shell 的产品负责人 Tali Roth 领衔，她在社交平台上多次回应用户质疑，表示搜索将“更简单、更不分散注意力”，并强调微软已经意识到 Windows 目前在搜索、资源管理器、系统行为等方面偏离了用户期待。 此前，微软刚刚对外宣称要“修好 Windows 11”，承诺提高性能和可靠性，包括更快的文件资源管理器…

title: 第三方 Skill 安全检查工具
content: The “skill-security-check” tool automatically performs a safety pre‑check for any Claude Skill before execution, flagging potentially dangerous skills. A GitHub report shows the tool’s own audit identifies a medium risk due to its `allowed-tools` list including Bash, which allows command execution. However, no dynamic injection or harmful commands were found; flagged strings were only in documentation, resulting in false positives. The tool is considered safe, recommended to run only manually with `disable-model-invocation` enabled.

content:

title: 🔥 SolonCode v2026.4.1 发布（比 ClaudeCode 简约的编程智能体）
content:
1、关于 SolonCode（编程终端智能体） SolonCode 是基于 Java + Solon AI 开发的 “Claude Code” 国产开源实现版本。

常见问题：它和 Claude Code、OpenCode 有什么不同？

功能上很相似，关键差异：

采用 Java 实现，100% 开源。
使用“全中文”提示词构建。
不绑定特定提供商。需要配置模型。模型迭代会缩小差异、降低成本，因此保持 provider-agnostic 很重要。
聚焦终端命令行界面 (CLI)，通过系统命令运行。
支持 Web，ACP 协议进行远程通讯。…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 梅子酒好吃

title: 超越谷歌Tesseract OCR！PaddleOCR登顶GitHub Star全球第一
content:
近日，百度文心衍生模型PaddleOCR在GitHub上的Star数突破73.3K，首次超越谷歌旗下开源OCR标杆产品Tesseract OCR（73.2K），成为全球Star数最高的OCR项目。 ﻿Tesseract OCR诞生于1985年，最初由惠普实验室研发，2005年开源后由Google接手维护并持续迭代，是OCR领域延续近四十年的技术标杆，长期位居GitHub OCR项目Star数榜首。此次被PaddleOCR超越，标志着这一标杆正在被新一代技术体系改写，也是大模型驱动下中国开源项目首次在OCR领域超越谷歌主导的标杆产品。

title: claude 订阅登录的 claude code，为什么经常会掉登录状态？
content: Users report that after subscribing to Claude, their login state frequently disappears. This occurs because tools such as cc‑switch periodically write to Claude’s configuration file, overwriting login information. As a result, the session resets after each alteration, causing the user to lose access.

title: GPT 移动端比网页慢很多？
content: Some users report that GPT on mobile devices runs much slower than on the web. They use a standard GPT account and a VPN node (Clash Verge on Windows 11, Clash Meta on Android). During conversations the mobile app lags, often stalling on load. Even after the notification indicates completion, the screen may refresh only after a few seconds or switching the app. Additionally, the mobile interface lacks the paced “thought‑chain” output seen on the web. This appears to be a bug or performance issue specific to the mobile app, not the GPT service itself.

normalizedTitle: gpt 移动端比网页慢很多

title: 今天和 HR 说取消校招，因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
content: The author, who previously dismissed AI, had a change of heart after an AI model (Claude 4.6 Sonnet) refactored a seven‑year‑old order‑settlement module in 20 minutes, producing Go code, tests, Kubernetes YAML, and identifying concurrency bugs it had not been instructed to find. The AI delivered a full code review that would normally require weeks of human effort, costing only a subscription fee. The author questions whether companies are outsourcing hiring to AI, the future of architecture roles, and how current graduates respond to such shifts.

title: Claude Code runs Git reset –hard origin/main against project repo every 10 mins

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.
eventKey: coding-agents-could-make-free-software
normalizedTitle: coding agents could make free software matter again
